theme_and_archetype.description: An ultra-premium, bright, and modern command center. Rejects standard dark mode tech clichés. Focuses on clarity, high-end typography, and subtle ambient motion. Uses a 'Crystal Glass' effect over a very soft, animated mesh background to create a rich, awed feeling without being dark. Emphasizes trust (green/bone) and high energy (coral/mint).

typography.strategy: The 'Creative Startup' Protocol - Bold, slightly wide headers paired with sterile, hyper-legible body text.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid - High density but generous padding within cards.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but amplified (p-6, p-8 inside cards).
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Crystal Glassmorphism over light mesh. Cards have bg-white/85, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px white border, and soft 8px radius.

sections.sidebar: Fixed, 260px width, clean 1px right border, soft gray active states.
sections.header: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl, z-50, simple page title and profile.
sections.kanban: Horizontal scrolling, clear lane separators, no heavy card drop-shadows (flat cards).
sections.dashboard_kpis: Bento grid, 4 columns, mixing tall and wide widget spans.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00594C] text-white hover:bg-[#004036] rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,89,76,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300 rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-gray-100 text-[#5C5C5C] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-xl p-6
cards.kanban_card: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:shadow-md transition-all
cards.idea_card: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-5 hover:border-[#00594C]/30 transition-all group

inputs.base: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00594C]/20 focus:border-[#00594C] outline-none transition-all w-full text-sm

charts.style: No grid lines or very faint dashed lines (stroke-opacity-0.1). Curved monotone lines (tension=0.4). Area charts should use gradient fills from #00E599 to transparent. Custom tooltip with glassmorphism.

claude_chat.container: Border-l border-gray-200 bg-[#FAFAFA] flex flex-col h-full
claude_chat.message_user: bg-[#00594C] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[85%] self-end
claude_chat.message_ai: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm text-gray-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[90%] self-start font-body prose prose-sm

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (y: 10 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.4s ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: For Idea Vault and Kanban: parent variants staggerChildren 0.05s, child variants y: 20 -> 0.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Kanban cards slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase.
motion_and_interactions.numbers: Use framer-motion to animate KPI numbers counting up on load.
motion_and_interactions.drag_drop: Spring physics for kanban drag and drop (stiffness: 300, damping: 25).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #5C5C5C and #0A0A0A meet APCA contrast over #F8F9F7 background.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#00594C]/50.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='kanban-drag-card', data-testid='claude-chat-input').

empty_state_dashboard.description: Abstract white/blue light streaks for empty states or generic placeholders

profile_placeholder.description: Professional camera setup placeholder for creator profile

monetization_bg.description: Money on table for affiliate/income tracker empty states or headers

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure `data-testid` is added to all Shadcn components and custom interactive elements.
Install and configure `framer-motion` for page transitions, kanban interactions, and animated numbers.
Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for a premium, consistent icon set.
For the Kanban board, you may use `@hello-pangea/dnd` or custom Framer Motion drag if preferred.
Implement the mesh gradient background using standard CSS radial gradients placed fixed behind the main content layout.
The Claude chat panel must support markdown rendering (use `react-markdown`).
Preload 50 realistic finance YouTube topics in the Idea Vault state.
